# Kraft Mortgages

Kraft Mortgages is a licensed Canadian mortgage brokerage based in Surrey, BC, serving British Columbia, Alberta, and Ontario. Founded by Varun Chaudhry (BCFSA #M08001935) with 23+ years of experience and $5B+ in funded mortgages.

## Services
- Residential Mortgages (purchases, renewals, refinances)
- Construction Financing (residential and commercial)
- Commercial Mortgages (multi-family, retail, industrial)
- Equity Lending (institutional private lenders — Antrim, Alta West, Vault, Sequence Capital)
- Private Lending (individual private lenders and MICs)
- MLI Select Program (CMHC multi-unit insurance)

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.kraftmortgages.ca
- Residential: https://www.kraftmortgages.ca/residential

- Apply: https://r.mtg-app.com/varun-chaudhry
- Contact: https://www.kraftmortgages.ca/contact

## Locations
- Surrey BC (headquarters): #301 - 1688 152nd Street, Surrey, BC V4A 4N2

- Licensed in BC, Alberta, and Ontario

## Content Guidelines
- All content written by licensed mortgage professionals
- No rate guarantees or approval promises
- Rates and figures are estimates for illustration only
- Consult a licensed broker for personalized advice
